summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Coin des Étudiants landing page. All major sections and functionality working correctly, with minor UI interactions requiring attention.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown options not clickable due to pointer event interception
Tab buttons (All/Stage/Alternance/Job) not responding to clicks

passed_tests: All WhatsApp links correctly pointing to https://chat.whatsapp.com/FmMwTvOaM2aJI98FShbLnC
Showcase section listing cards display (6 total)
Modal functionality for listing details ('Voir' button opens modal)
How It Works section with 3 steps
Jobs section display with 6 job cards
Contact form fields (name, email, subject dropdown, message)
Contact form submission and success message display
Footer with correct social links (Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, Email)
Mobile responsive design and mobile menu functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dropdown/tab click interactions: 1) Category filter dropdown options in showcase section cannot be clicked due to pointer event interception. 2) Jobs section tab buttons (All/Stage/Alternance/Job) are not responding to clicks. Both likely need force=true or better event handling.
